Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 25
STR: +10
WT: 12.0 Size: LARGE
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL except DWF HFL GNM
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 25
STR: +10
WT: 12.0 Size: LARGE
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL except DWF HFL GNM

Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 45

no earrings no treeweave, 25 nameds killed and 100+ ancients

CHeating filthy game

Rathe GM event
QuoteReply
# Feb 10 2005 at 3:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591791599095
50 posts
These dropped today in a GM event in Rathe Mtns. A GM was controlling the named while the groups formed. Was funny running around chasing it. It couldnt be attacked for a while. Kind of wish there was more to it than a tree weave but was fun to do something different for a hour or so.
▲ Page top
Pretty good
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2004 at 10:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591813515999
10 posts
I am a lv 21 RNG currently and got this as reward from a GM Event that started in Paludal Caverns. I had a complete chainmail look going on so this is da out of place on my char but with leather bracers on (Bracers of Erollisi) it looks pretty cool. Nice little reward.

QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2003 at 10:23 PM Rating: Default

21 posts
Just bought one in the Bazaar on Morell-Thule for 150 pp. Very good deal. =)
▲ Page top
My 2cp
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2003 at 3:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362746384
1 post
I purchased this chest piece on Fennin Ro for 300pp, and am happier than a dung beetle in an outhouse!
For the price it just can't be beat. I share this piece with 2 other lower level alts, one Ranger and one Beastlord. We all enjoy the benefits of the higher AC while relishing the strength bonus for the attack value.
Right now I'm looking for 2 more at reasonable prices (FREE would be good) for my alts. While it may look plain, my concern is and will always be, living to reach a nice retirement age so I can see myself wearing uber armor that is all shiny, vivid and matches. Then I'll grab my teeth, my cane, and my sword and hit the road slaying all that crosses me.
-Forever Young-
Budmeister Buffinator
32nd lvl Shammy (Fennin Ro)

▲ Page top
Forever....
QuoteReply
# Aug 13 2003 at 10:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791986430
1 post
I've been trying to get this piece for my Druid. I've killed Gorgul Paclock at least 10 times and more Forrest Giant Ancients then I can count. Still no Tree Weave... If you want this piece be prepared for a long camp.
▲ Page top
Str - Vs _ Weight
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2003 at 3:28 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591759842965
24 posts
erm,correct me if I'm wrong ,but, the weight of the item, is heavier than the Strength it grants,
so, wouldn't that make the Strength advancement a moot point?

Edited, Sat Aug 2 16:24:04 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Str - Vs _ Weight
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2004 at 3:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592343673941
161 posts
Well, not to mention even if the thing weighed 20 stones the strength still helps with damage and in a rogues case... backstabs. Also if you mean for a monk, weight is weight, even if you have a ton of strength. Like if 20 stones is the limit before your AC drops, thats what it is. It does not matter what your strength is. Besides, look how many pieces you have... they probably all weigh something, and not all of them even add strength. But sure, think of it as weigning 2 stones. I would POSSIBLY put this on a monk, for the simple fact the raw ac, and most other times oyu wear pretty light stuff. I kind of still like the old Lockjaw vest. Tough to beat AC/Weight when your not a twink, its nice.

Edited, Thu Jul 1 16:52:30 2004
▲ Page top
RE: Str - Vs _ Weight
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2003 at 11:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362591654
10 posts

__DEL__1591779392586

▲ Page top
Great item!!
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2003 at 6:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591790079863
View User Forum
52 posts
Bought this for my SK at about lvl 25 for 200p. I'm still using it at lvl 47, although I'm looking to upgrade now. This is probably the best chest item for a meele class for under 1k. The 25ac is very good for an item of this price, and +10 str is also a big bonus. If you want a great cheap tank chest item get one of these

▲ Page top
Upgrade from Ro
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2002 at 1:38 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591773109889
View User Forum
Scholar
17 posts
For Paladins in their early/mid 40's in a reasonable group,this is a good progression from the BP of Ro if the 10 Fire resist isn't needed.The advantages/disadvantages are:
Raw AC +5
Weight +7 but np as
STR +6
Fire Resist -10
i.e. you can take more damage and the extra STR will increase your maximum damage output.Keep the Ro BP for Fire resist requirements :=)
p.s. Thanks Misermeisterr :~}
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 02 2002 at 6:28 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This tree weave is really nice. I could use it for several of my alts on the Karana server if anyone wants to sell one.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 21 2002 at 9:12 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) nothing to say, wanted to but no...lol
#REDACTED, Posted: May 15 2002 at 11:02 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) WTB or WTT for one on Povar. Payin well, or trading a Jarashes Trident (Worth 4k) 4 it. Send me an Email at Schwartz.D.06@k-o.org

# May 04 2002 at 10:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250320624

Ok, people talking about looks over ac - my opinion is that looks can go with ac. My ranger wears this, along with the Kromrif Leggs, and the rest Tolans (boots, arms, bracer, gaunts, and helm) - which is a pretty nice look and nice ac there for a ranger (who is really my 3rd character).

Ancient drop?
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2002 at 5:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595176787481
Scholar
48 posts
Has anyone actually seen the Tree Weave drop off an Ancient in BW? I've spent Many hours camping this spot for xp and such over the past couple of years, have gotten 3 Tree Weave Tunics, but I've never seen it drop off a Forest Giant Ancient.

I'd be most interested in hearing that it does, even if ultra rare. It would make the camp just a tad more exciting with the hope of getting an Ancient to drop it.

Bakamon Gudfellow
Head of Gudfellow Clan
▲ Page top

QuoteReply

16 posts
Ihave never seen an ancient drop it but Gorgul Paclock does drop it (uncommon i think).

cool BP
QuoteReply
# Mar 16 2002 at 10:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770355928
20 posts
While doing a free rez at the fort (after a long run), Gorgul attacks my recently rezzed friend. I hang around to make sure he is ok, and help by healing and nuking a bit, and this BP is the loot. The nice gent gives it to me as reward for the rez (I expected none). Helluva day!

Edited, Sat Mar 16 22:11:52 2002
